purpose: Body-to-brain diagnostic cortex: convert body maps, passports, dependencies, health, and diagnostic rules into compact actionable signals without pretending to be the brain.

body_object_registry.body_role: candidate learning factory and school lifecycle
governed source selection before school material intake
only governed packet/intake/merge path into compact memory
bounded inner motor / test life runtime surface

dependency_graph.reason: cortex reads canonical body composition map
cortex reads organ passport status and maturity
self-model depends on map freshness and validator chain
live-dependent validators require AIMO live runtime
school material intake depends on governed source routing
AIMO consumes compact memory packets through intake path

diagnostic_rules.rule: Treat validator/runtime/map failure as symptom until upstream dependencies, passport state, live/lab boundary, stale authority, duplicate maps, and proof freshness are checked.
Do not create full organ passports for validators, proofs, docs, packs, or support surfaces; create registry/support records and owner links instead.
If a live-required validator fails while live runtime is down, root-cause candidate is live runtime absent, not necessarily the validator or target organ.
If canonical body map is current and capability invocation fails, do not treat map as root cause until capability dependencies are checked.
Validated lab passport does not imply PASSPORT_ACTIVE; active requires owner/route acceptance and dedicated gate.
Duplicate/junk surfaces require authority classification and safe deletion/quarantine/reject decision before removal.

likely_root_cause_candidates: live-dependent validators excluded from lab proof
passport not active for live invocation
diagnostic_packets.safe_next_probe: Restart/validate live AIMO under owner-authorized controlled route, then rerun live-dependent validators.

diagnostic_packets.symptom: organ has files but no trust
diagnostic_packets.safe_next_probe: Create draft organ passport from confirmed component evidence, then run dedicated lab validator.

diagnostic_packets.symptom: many body objects look like organs
likely_root_cause_candidates: candidate/support surfaces mixed with organ layer
raw file count interpreted as organ count
diagnostic_packets.safe_next_probe: Classify all objects into organ/candidate/support/proof/doc/material, then issue passport requirements only to organ classes.
